arts.ttl: The woman on the Atalanta badge and the incredible connection to Real Madrid
arts.sum: She grew up strong and vowed never to marry, dedicating herself to Artemis, goddess of the hunt, and avoiding marriage because an oracle had predicted that she would be turned into an animal on her wedding day. The Bergamo-based club was founded in 1907 by a group of students, who named it after the heroine from the archaic cycle of Greek mythology.
